demo.name: Cayenne Pepper
description: Large, crisp peppers used to season many a dish.
They make the flavor richer - and the bite hotter.
Just don't overdo it.
comment: Burns like a sea witch's poison.

demo.name: Banana
description: A sweet fruit. Found in the Coastal Jungle.

demo.name: Coconut
description: Found on the beach, and on palm trees along the shore in the Coastal Jungle.

demo.name: Rum Bottle
description: The finest seasoning for any pirate dish.
Carried by pirates.
comment: We ran out of rum today.
The crew sobered up a bit... What a damned mess.
The scoundrels tried to hatch a plot...
- Edward Teach

demo.name: Coconut Milk with Bananas
description: A refreshing drink of coconut milk and ripe bananas.
Quenches thirst and lends strength for long fights beneath a scorching sun.
comment: A sip of pure paradise.

demo.name: Spicy "Chicken" with Sweet Potato
description: A hearty, spicy dish of meat, hot spices, and sweet potato.
Warms you up and restores your strength.
comment: One bite and your chest will blaze, your weariness burning to ash.
Your throat may suffer in the process.

demo.name: Bacon and Eggs
description: A hearty breakfast of fresh eggs and smoked bacon - the perfect start to a day in the Paradise Archipelago.
comment: A rare breakfast for a sailor, especially at sea.

demo.name: Boiled Crab
description: A simple, but exquisite delicacy.
comment: Five minutes ago, it was scuttling along the shore...

demo.name: Spicy Breaded Kebab
description: Tastes like chicken.
comment: A true sailor eats meat off the fire, drinks rum straight from the bottle, and sleeps with a knife under his pillow.

demo.name: Skewered Meat
description: Meat with a hint of smoke.
comment: Perfect food - no fork, no knife, no manners required.
- "No-Hands" Flynn, carpenter

demo.name: Spicy Skewered Crab
description: Crisp, spiced, and hearty enough to satisfy your hunger and lift your mood.
comment: If your tongue isn't numb, the cook went easy on the spices.

demo.name: Hearty Egg Broth
description: A hearty stew cooked when the hold is full of supplies and the crew's been at sea for less than a week.
comment: If there's only one sweet potato left in the galley, we're nearing either a port or a mutiny.
- ship's cook "One-Eyed" Axel

demo.name: Dodo Broth
description: A delicate, crystal-clear broth made from dodo meat.
Served to the stick, the wounded... and sailors after a wild night at the tavern.
comment: The tempting smell of a boiling pot has brought more people back from the brink of death than any potion ever could.
- ship's cook "One-Eyed" Axel

demo.name: Coconut Soup
description: This thick coconut-milk soup brings hot shores to mind - even in a storm.
comment: Tastes like a paradise island that we will never reach.
- "Cooked Compass" Billy, navigator
